source.admissible_use: exact Urbach static/dynamic disorder components and same-point dual-modality feasibility; not numerical gap-offset pooling
source.composition_provenance: sample compositions printed approximately as x=0.40, 0.30, and 0.21; specimen-level uncertainty and independent method not reported in the source
source.model_conditioning: Urbach width fitted as W(T)=A+B*coth(hbar*omega_LO/(2*k*T)); Figure 1 pairing does not supply an identified numerical gap-offset operator
source.notes: n-type intentionally In-doped MBE HgCdTe on CdZnTe (211)B, carrier density in the low 1e15 cm^-3 range. Transmissivity and photoconductivity were measured simultaneously at the same sample point. Figure 1 shows 77 K and 293 K pairs but does not identify the specimen composition or provide a numerical paired gap table.
source.title: Near-Bandgap Infrared Absorption Properties of HgCdTe
